## Snapshot
- Goal: Demonstrate SplitButton action pattern inside an Information Banner
- Target user: Developers implementing compound action buttons in banners
- Main job-to-be-done: Show how to compose ButtonGroup + Menu as a SplitButton in Banner's action slot

## Confirmed Requirements
- Information-colored Banner with text "Translate and save as English?"
- SplitButton with primary action "Translate to English"
- Dropdown menu item "Translate to other language"
- No close button on the Banner

## Inferred Requirements
- [confidence: 0.95] SplitButton built with `ButtonGroup attached` + `Button` + `Menu > IconButton`
- [confidence: 0.90] Multiple Banner size variants shown for reference (medium, large, small)
- [confidence: 0.95] Button variant follows Banner rules: subtle for medium/small, solid for large
- [confidence: 0.95] Banner icon auto-generated from `color` prop (no manual Icon added)

## Open Questions
- None

## UI Mapping (Requirement -> Aegis Component)
- Banner container -> `Banner` (color="information", closeButton={false})
- Split button primary -> `ButtonGroup` (attached) + `Button`
- Split button dropdown -> `Menu` + `Menu.Anchor` + `IconButton` + `Menu.Box`
- Dropdown items -> `ActionList` + `ActionList.Item`

## Component Composition
```
ButtonGroup (attached, color="information")
├── Button → "Translate to English" (primary action)
└── Menu
    ├── Menu.Anchor → IconButton (LfAngleDownMiddle chevron)
    └── Menu.Box → ActionList → "Translate to other language"
```

## Design Decisions
- SplitButton is not a native Aegis component; composed from existing primitives
- `LfAngleDownMiddle` icon for the dropdown chevron (standard pattern)
- `LfGlobe` icon in ActionList item for translation context
